aronui.when_to_use: List all scheduled automation tasks with their today status (Done, Scheduled, Due, In progress) and parameters.
aronui.output_shape: A formatted text list of automations, each with name, ID, active status, schedule, next run time, today status, and prompt.

pitfalls.text: No arguments are required; the tool accepts an empty object or any JSON object (extra keys are ignored). No errors were observed for missing, empty, or wrong-type arguments. The tool always returns su

procedure: Call the tool with an empty object {} (or any object, as extra keys are ignored).
The tool returns a formatted list of scheduled automations with their details and today status.
verification: Confirm that the output starts with '📋 Scheduled Automations:' and contains entries with name, ID, schedule, and status.
Check that no error message is returned (tool always succeeds).

predict_records.predicted: success: The tool will return a list of scheduled automation tasks with their statuses.

success: **📋 Scheduled Automations:**
